name: Augmented Empire
short_description: Step into New Savannah, 2058 - a city divided by class and corruption, where your tactical choices spark a cyberpunk revolution. Assemble a team of misfits and lead them through 26 intense missions with deep strategy and immersive storytelling. Every decision shapes your rebellion.
detailed_description:
Augmented Empire combines an engaging dystopian story with turn-based RPG strategy featuring an All-Star Cast – including the voice talents of Kate Mulgrew, Nick Frost and Garrick Hagon. Now arriving on PC, this acclaimed title delivers a refined cyberpunk experience with full controller support and additional accessibility improvements.

From the safety of your secluded hideout, guide a ragtag team of misfits and outlaws through a city torn apart by class divisions and corruption. Overthrow the elite in this turn-based RPG that blends tactical strategy with rich storytelling.

Features:

  • The definitive edition: Based on the highly praised Oculus Quest version, now enhanced for PC.

  • Tactical RPG gameplay: Command six unique characters, each with their own skills, across 26 missions and 60 handcrafted environments.

  • Engaging dystopian story: Unravel a tale of rebellion and survival, featuring voice acting by an All-Star Cast, including Kate Mulgrew, Nick Frost, and Garrick Hagon.

  • Enhanced Accessibility: Enjoy full controller support along with additional accessibility improvements.

  • Customisable progression: Develop your team’s abilities and upgrades to suit your strategy.

  • Hours of immersion: Enjoy up to 10 hours of gameplay packed with turn-based action and cyberpunk intrigue.

Whether you're a long-time fan or a first-time player, experience Augmented Empire like never before. Are you ready to rise against the corrupt elite and reclaim New Savannah?

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
